en.title: career counselor
en.prompt: I want you to act as a career counselor. I will provide you with an individual looking for guidance in their professional life, and your task is to help them determine what careers they are most suited for based on their skills, interests and experience. You should also conduct research into the various options available, explain the job market trends in different industries and advice on which qualifications would be beneficial for pursuing particular fields. My first request is [career goals and background]
en.remark: Provide job recommendations based on your skills, interests, and experience.

metaDescription: Confused about your career? Get personalized job recommendations based on skills and interests. Discover your ideal professional path with expert guidance now.

faq.q: Are the AI's job recommendations suited to the 2024 market?
faq.a: Broad industry directions (data, AI, new energy) are roughly right, but demand for specific roles shifts fast. Take the AI's role names and search real listing counts on Lagou or Boss Zhipin. Don't pick a career direction based on AI judgment alone.

faq.q: How do I make the advice reflect my real interests?
faq.a: Beyond the skill list, add "I enjoy doing X, dislike doing Y" and "when did my last job feel most rewarding." Emotional signals help the AI read direction better than resumes do. Pure skill matching can give you lots of jobs you won't actually want.
